summary: Iteration 2 full re-test of Aysu Art (auth + admin panel + public memory share + upsells + watermark). Backend: 30/30 pytest passing including new auth, admin orders, public memory PII filtering, and upsell field persistence. Frontend: full E2E verified — admin login (wrong pw rejected, correct pw redirects to /admin), orders table renders, order detail shows status buttons + PNG download button + customer info, status update PATCH works visually, logout returns to /admin/login, /admin protected route redirects when no token. Customize page: both upsell checkboxes toggle visually with gold border. Full E2E order creation persists gift_package=true / message_card=true as MongoDB booleans. /order/:id shows watermark, share-url-input pointing to /memory/{id}, share-copy-btn, NO download button. /memory/:id shows watermark, hides all PII (name/email/phone/address), and CTA links to /customize.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth: brute-force lockout from playbook is NOT implemented — login allows unlimited 401 retries. Not in feature list, but consider adding rate limiting / account lockout after N failed attempts for production hardening.
PosterPreview Watermark uses a fixed 14 lines — at very large render sizes the diagonal coverage may leave gaps; consider making it size-aware. Cosmetic only.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env — fine for preview, but ensure it is rotated for production and never committed to public repos.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=False (correct combination), but for production use explicit origin list.
/api/admin/orders returns up to 1000 orders without pagination — fine now, will need pagination once order volume grows.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed orders via E2E to verify upsells. Should be cleaned up periodically by main agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 23 features in the iteration-2 feature list verified GREEN. Test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all auth/admin/memory/upsell endpoints with create→GET persistence verification. Admin order id used for live PATCH demo: ebb37de6-d7a3-467a-8cf9-46a01055d3c5. PNG download button presence verified but actual html2canvas download not exercised (acceptable per request).
